color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Claude Code Loads SKILL.md
(~1 KB)
Terse launcher only

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SKILL.md Points to:
reference/index.md
for full command list

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Claude Code JIT Loads:
reference/<command>.md
(~2-3 KB per file)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Model Sees Full
Command Details
and Examples

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Model Invokes
gemini skill
with chosen flags

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Why this works:
- SKILL.md is read ONCE per session
- Most sessions don't need full reference
- reference files loaded JIT when model decides to invoke skill
- Token savings: ~N users × M sessions × cost of 1KB SKILL.md
- Principle of Least Information: model only reads
what it actually needs to emit a command
